StepAction: Idle; provider awaiting next codex doStream call
DD-1: derivePredictedCacheMiss(sessionExec, lastFinished) returns hit/miss/unknown based on observable cache.read; sticky continuationInvalidatedAt no longer forces miss when cache evidence is alive

WS streaming via transport-ws.ts wsRequest; observes frames; mutates wsObs (frameCount, terminalEventReceived, wsCloseCode, wsCloseReason, wsErrorReason); SSE pipeline consumes frames in parallel emitting LMv2 parts
Classify empty turn; predicate ladder selects causeFamily and recoveryAction; ws_no_frames now covers both clean close-without-frames and onerror-without-frames cases (wsErrorReason discriminates)
Condition: classification complete with wsErrorReason field threaded into payload

StepAction: Persist forensic evidence: empty-turn-log appends JSONL line including wsErrorReason field; non-blocking on file write failure (CET-001 breadcrumb)
Apply recovery action selected by classifier; INV-08 retry cap demotion holds
Condition: recoveryAction IN {pass-through-to-runloop-nudge, log-and-continue, synthesize-from-deltas} OR retryAttempted == true

StepAction: Retry attempt 2: WS reopens with same body; flip retryAttempted=true; cap held at 1 by INV-08
Emit finish part with finishReason + providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification; no exception ever leaves codex provider package (INV-01 preserved; DD-2 closes the leak that violated it)
Normal completion: emit finish part with finishReason in {stop, tool-calls, length}; classifier was NOT invoked; no providerMetadata.emptyTurnClassification attached

DD-3: processor.ts catch / isModelTemporaryError reads providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification.causeFamily as opaque metadata; if present, returns false so handleRateLimitFallback is NOT invoked; else existing pattern matching continues for genuine 5xx/quota/overload
Cycle complete; runloop processes nudge or normal finish; provider returns to idle
